prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence only. Coordinates, native contacts, AlphaFold-style models, and post-seal validation metadata are blocked.

RCSB pure metadata title: human 48S PIC with Kozak mRNA and eIF1A W70A mutant. Entity description: Eukaryotic translation initiation factor 2 subunit 1. Organism/taxonomy: Homo sapiens. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived globular closure hydrophobic core tendency
